title: Sisters of the Gion
writer: Aleksandr Kuprin, Kenji Mizoguchi, Yoshikata Yoda
actors: Isuzu Yamada, Yôko Umemura, Benkei Shiganoya
plot: Two geisha sisters lead a hard life in the Gion district of Kyoto. After one of them feels obliged to support a bankrupt businessman, the other sister sets up various schemes to get rid of him.
